description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named apple that triggers on push to master and tags, pull requests, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has two jobs: build and packaging. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, downloads and configures cctools, and builds the project for multiple platforms and architectures. The packaging job runs on macos-latest, downloads the build artifacts, configures packaging names, imports certificates, signs the build, notarizes the release, and creates a release.
